$comment: Copy to config/sources.pg.json for docker/compose.pg.yaml. This is the Postgres variant of sources.example.json: db_url_env names the env var containing the postgres:// URL. docker/compose.pg.yaml sets SYMPHONY_DB_URL to its internal Postgres service by default; override it for an external database. GitHub sources may add token_pools and set a project object's token_pool to route that repo through a different PAT pool; projects without token_pool, or whose named pool has no set token values, use the source-level token_env/fallback_token_envs. Set a source's optional enabled:false to keep it in config but skip sync runs.
$comment_db_path: db_path is still required by the shared config schema but is unused when db_url_env selects Postgres.
$comment_timezone: Optional IANA timezone the board buckets calendar days in (e.g. "Asia/Taipei"). Omit or leave empty for UTC.
